headline: Stryker Investors Weigh Cyberattack Recovery As CEO Joins GE HealthCare Board
summary: Stryker CEO Kevin Lobo has been appointed to the Board of Directors of GE HealthCare. The appointment links leadership at two large medical technology companies with global reach. Stryker, traded as NYSE:SYK, enters this leadership development with its shares at $345.81. Over the past 3 years the stock shows a total return of 30.7%, and over 5 years a total return of 55.7%, which gives investors some historical context for how the company has rewarded long term holders. For investors...

headline: GEHC & Springbok Collaborate on MRI Muscle Analysis for Sports
summary: GE HealthCare teams with Springbok to pair MRI tech with AI muscle analytics, aiming to redefine how muscle health is measured and visualized.

headline: Hologic's Women's Health Index Flags Alarming Gaps in STI Screening
summary: HOLX's Global Women's Health Index shows STI testing stagnates at 10%, leaving nearly 2 billion women at risk despite gains in other screenings.

raw.headline: Hologic's Women's Health Index Flags Alarming Gaps in STI Screening

headline: The Iran war is threatening supply of a little-thought-of resource — helium. What it means for markets
summary: Supply allocations are being set by who needs the gas the most. Semiconductors are at the "top of the pecking order," said helium consultant Phil Kornbluth.

raw.headline: The Iran war is threatening supply of a little-thought-of resource — helium. What it means for markets
raw.summary: Supply allocations are being set by who needs the gas the most. Semiconductors are at the "top of the pecking order," said helium consultant Phil Kornbluth.

headline: BTIG Reiterates Buy on GE HealthCare Techs, Maintains $91 Price Target
summary: BTIG  analyst Ryan Zimmerman   reiterates GE HealthCare Techs (NASDAQ:GEHC) with a Buy and maintains $91 price target.
